fallback: shared/ references unavailable from GitHub (HTTP 404); analysis performed with Read/Grep/Glob/Bash

checks.money_flow_coverage: N/A — no money-flow code in this project
checks.security_flow_coverage: 3/5 — command injection OK (static args); fs deletion untested for uchg/failure paths; MiseCleaner::remove_with_uchg has zero test coverage
checks.data_integrity_coverage: 4/10 — deletion paths covered for 4/6 cleaners; Mise uchg/before-delete untested; GAP-004 Browser version_key edge-case can panic; GAP-005 symlink not guarded
checks.core_journey_coverage: 8.5/10 — scan/select/clean TUI and E2E well covered; MiseCleaner dry-run not covered by integration or E2E test

findings.description: clean() deletes runtimes not in `mise ls --current` but does NOT cross-check .mise.toml files in HOME (CLAUDE.md safety rule). A pinned older version is silently deleted.

chflags -R nouchg failure is swallowed by `let _ = runner.run(...)`. If uchg cannot be cleared, remove_dir_all either fails with a confusing error or (on some FS) incorrectly deletes a read-only tree.
Only uppercase GB/MB/KB are tested. Lowercase (gb/mb/kb), space-padded ('1 GB'), and '0GB' all return None — real brew output may vary by locale.
version_key('') returns empty vec; find_old_versions calls .max().unwrap() on versions with empty key — can panic. Empty/non-digit directory names have no test.
Stale symlinks to old browser builds are not guarded (is_dir() returns true for symlinks pointing to dirs). A broken symlink could also cause an unexpected delete path.
No test for symlink/special-file entries mixed into simple-vN dirs. E2E happy-path covered, but edge case untested.
No test explicitly confirms that `--yes` (via `run_auto`) bypasses the interactive stdin prompt for Xcode clean. Currently relies on the code path being unreachable in `run_auto`, but not verified.
Boundary tests exist but are written against system_clock which is UTC in tests. DST/midnight transitions at the boundary epoch are not explicitly modeled.
The '~' (tilde alone, no trailing slash) branch at line 72-73 is untested. Current tests only cover '~/.local/share/kilo/log'.

node-gyp cache directories are deleted without any uchg flag clearing. If APFS marks those directories as immutable, deletion will fail silently or with a confusing error. No uchg retry is implemented for GenericCleaner.
